acts.name: Setup
acts.summary: Lin Wei accepts the Han Bo case. Old life established; first hairline crack appears.
acts.central_image: the mentor's burning robe at dawn

chapters.title: The Gowning
chapters.summary: Lin Wei watches Judge Tao's retirement gowning at dawn. Receives the Han Bo case file at breakfast. Notices, but does not register, that the case is older than she has been told.

beats.opening_trigger: Lin Wei stands at the brazier in the dawn garden.
beats.closing_image: the sleeve rises into smoke; the shoulder drops.

facts.detail: barefoot, does not flinch
hood pulled up for an hour

state_changes.after: retired (the robe is fire)

beats.opening_trigger: Tao crosses the wet grass; brief embrace.
beats.closing_image: Lin Wei steps inside the College, carrying Tao's last in-office words.

facts.detail: ritual palms-flat at shoulder-blades
'Carry it carefully. It is older than you have been told.'

state_changes.after: carries an unread warning

beats.opening_trigger: Refectory. Mei across the table; the case file on her own desk later.
beats.closing_image: the black sleeve untied, the contents slid flat.

facts.detail: Han Bo moved to intake at 11
'The Council would let it go to Park.'
'I am persuaded that I should take this one.'

state_changes.after: has chosen the case

beats.opening_trigger: Lin Wei reads the file cover page.
beats.closing_image: she lifts her hand from the page and turns to the next.

facts.detail: date of incident: August 14, 2042
she had been nine

state_changes.after: Han Bo is from her ninth year — but she does not yet let herself know

chapters.title: The Defendant
chapters.opening_image: Han Bo seated, hands palm-down on the bare table.
chapters.summary: Lin Wei meets Han Bo for the formal intake. He says almost nothing. He has one tic — he watches her hands.

beats.opening_trigger: Lin Wei enters the intake chamber.
beats.closing_image: she sits across from him; draws gloves on.

facts.detail: already seated

beats.opening_trigger: Lin Wei reads the rights script; depresses the bead.
beats.closing_image: she sets her pen down and asks for a statement.

facts.detail: two-party recording; standard sheets
defense Reader nominated
stands on right

state_changes.after: intake closed

beats.opening_trigger: Long silence. Han Bo's eyes settle on her hands.
beats.closing_image: the small nod that ends the silence without filling it; she walks the blue corridor.

facts.detail: the way one looks at something long awaited
'No statement, Reader Lin.'

state_changes.after: trained-not-to-think about why he watched her hands

chapters.title: The Letter
chapters.opening_image: the manila envelope arrives in the second post.
chapters.summary: A sealed letter arrives from her father, whom she has not seen in three years. He has been moved into hospice. She does not open the letter.

beats.opening_trigger: The envelope is set on the desk, square with the corner.
beats.closing_image: the composition — envelope, teacup, oak — is very nearly beautiful.

facts.detail: manila, single sheet, her father's hand
square with desk corner

state_changes.after: the past is sealed and on the desk

beats.opening_trigger: She tries to work the file; the envelope moves a quarter inch from each page-turn.
beats.closing_image: she lifts the envelope; sets it down; the bell that is not a bell rings.

beats.opening_trigger: Console chimes; Mei.
beats.closing_image: Mei: 'Friday.' Lin Wei: 'Friday.' The console pip.

facts.detail: 'I want to tell you something. In person. Friday.'

state_changes.after: co-prosecutor with a thing to say

acts.name: Confrontation
acts.summary: The trial begins. A witness's testimony arrives in a palette Lin Wei recognizes. The midpoint reversal: the case record contains her own memory.
acts.central_image: the dim water of the speculum, full of someone's last hour

chapters.title: The Witness's Palette
chapters.opening_image: the witness's gloved hand on the deposition table.
chapters.summary: Lin Wei deposes the prosecution's third witness. The witness's extracted memory, read by Park, comes in colors Lin Wei has tasted before.

beats.opening_trigger: Du Yan in the witness chair; Park at the lectern; recording bead on.
beats.closing_image: Park rises to render.

facts.detail: rendered in private 3 days prior

beats.opening_trigger: Park renders the donor's sensory palette.
beats.closing_image: Lin Wei stops her pen against the page; the page tilts; she does not look up.

facts.detail: struck wineglass register; cold green tea; brown-gold field
shorthand: struck wineglass; green tea cold; brown-gold field

state_changes.before: trusts the cross-index that disqualified palette-twins from her cases
state_changes.after: knows the system has missed something — but does not yet act

beats.function: first reckoning — Lin Wei registers and does not act
beats.opening_trigger: Park finishes; expects her examination.
beats.closing_image: she writes, in her private shorthand: 'The same palette. Not possible. Possible.'

facts.detail: without conducting examination beyond pro forma
'The same palette. Not possible. Possible.'

state_changes.after: rational gatekeeper who has registered an irrationality and is still holding the line

chapters.title: Vigil
chapters.opening_image: the chapel clock stops; silence accumulates.
chapters.summary: Lin Wei attends the College's evening vigil for the first time in nine years. Tao is there. They do not speak. She remembers a hymn she had forgotten.

beats.opening_trigger: She walks across the wet grass to the chapel at the third bell.
beats.closing_image: she lets her sensorium empty into the slate and stone.

facts.detail: for the first time in nine years

state_changes.after: porous to her own sensorium

beats.opening_trigger: A fragment of a hymn surfaces. A woman's voice. Two notes, then stops.
beats.closing_image: the woman's voice sings two notes and stops.

facts.detail: a voice not Tao's; lower, warmer, slower

state_changes.after: ninth year has a voice in it

beats.function: Tao gives an opening; Lin Wei doesn't take it
beats.opening_trigger: Tao crosses, sits beside her.
beats.closing_image: Tao stands; lays her hand briefly on Lin Wei's shoulder; leaves.

facts.detail: 'If there is a thing you would like to ask me before tomorrow, you may ask it tonight.'

state_changes.after: did not ask — but knows she could have

chapters.title: The Speculum
chapters.opening_image: the dim water of the speculum.
chapters.summary: The midpoint. Reader Ji renders Du Yan's record in open court. Within the rendered memory: a corridor, a soup smell, a child watching from the gallery. Lin Wei recognizes the child as herself.

beats.opening_trigger: Lin Wei takes the prosecution chair; Mei beside her; Park across the well.
beats.closing_image: Reader Ji begins the descent.

facts.detail: barefoot, by protocol

beats.opening_trigger: Ji rises, walks to the lectern, drinks the cup of clear water.
beats.closing_image: the donor's mind, the rendering says, was 'elsewhere — partially in the building of childhood.'

beats.opening_trigger: Ji renders: 'the donor's left hand held the wrist of a child.'
beats.closing_image: Lin Wei lifts her gloved hand to the level of her jaw; holds it there.

facts.detail: 'the donor's left hand held the wrist of a child'
the corridor is the corridor she stood in at nine

beats.function: midpoint reversal — Lin Wei recognizes herself
beats.opening_trigger: Ji concludes. He bows.
beats.closing_image: she says, in the voice of the rebuttal: 'I am persuaded that the rendering is complete.' The third note holds in the back of her mind.

facts.detail: the wrist scar; the man's hand; her aunt's tea cup
'I am persuaded that the rendering is complete.'
for one hour

emotions.emotion: midpoint break held inside professional containment

state_changes.before: knows the rendering matches her sensorium
state_changes.after: knows the rendering IS her sensorium — and the child is her

acts.name: Resolution
acts.summary: Lin Wei retrieves enough of her ninth year to understand what the record means. She makes the choice. She loses. The novel ends with her opening her father's letter.
acts.central_image: the speculum refilled, dimmer than before; the climax look across the well

chapters.title: The Eastern Quarter
chapters.opening_image: the pale brick of the old tram roadbed.
chapters.summary: Lin Wei takes a half-day leave. She walks the disused tram route. She reaches to push a door she does not consciously remember.

beats.opening_trigger: She crosses the bridge over the canal and walks east.
beats.closing_image: her shoes register the give of the old tram-bed brick.

facts.detail: half-day

state_changes.after: allows herself the route

beats.opening_trigger: Console chime: Mei.
beats.closing_image: the gull lifts and is gone; Lin Wei walks on.

facts.detail: bulletin at 4 PM; for the reform office
'Don't go through this alone. Take Park's offer.'

state_changes.after: resigned (to be discovered offscreen by ch.11)

beats.function: midpoint collision via place — Han Bo's old apartment door
beats.opening_trigger: She arrives at Pao Street; her hand rises toward the unnamed button.
beats.closing_image: the man's name had been Han. She lowers her hand. She walks back.

facts.detail: she did not know how she had come
a man with a workman's hand carried her up; gave her cold green tea in a white cup; the man's name was Han
does not press the button

state_changes.after: Han Bo is the man who once carried her — but she has only the body's knowing

chapters.title: A Reader Reads Herself
chapters.opening_image: the desk lamp at three in the morning.
chapters.summary: Lin Wei reads the rendered transcript alone — looking for the parts a Reader doesn't render because they aren't admissible. Through the gaps she reconstructs.

beats.function: the room, the gloves off, the record on the table
beats.opening_trigger: She breaks the Council seal at 3:12 AM.
beats.closing_image: she begins to read for the gaps, not the rendering.

state_changes.after: Reader reading her own case in private — a soft transgression

beats.function: the unrendered gaps; the second sound under the wineglass
beats.opening_trigger: She finds the gap on the second page.
beats.closing_image: the third note holds; she does not name the voice; she lets the brown-gold field stand.

facts.detail: beneath the wineglass tone: a woman singing two notes

beats.function: the name 'Han' attached to the hand
beats.opening_trigger: She finds the second gap: the donor's thumb on a child's wrist scar.
beats.closing_image: she looks at the inside of her own left wrist; the ringed scar is there.

facts.detail: the small ringed scar she has had since three
the man on the stairwell — Han

state_changes.after: knows in language: Han = Han Bo, the defendant

chapters.title: The Father's Letter
chapters.opening_image: the envelope in her hand at the apartment window.
chapters.summary: She does not open the letter. She brings it to court instead. She knows what it says without opening it.

beats.function: she still does not open it
beats.opening_trigger: She holds the envelope for eleven minutes.
beats.closing_image: she sets it back, square with the corner.

facts.detail: 11 minutes

beats.function: she chooses what to carry into court
beats.opening_trigger: She slides the envelope into the inner pocket of her robe.
beats.closing_image: she walks the long blue corridor with the file and the envelope.

facts.detail: left inner pocket of robe

state_changes.after: letter is against her ribs

beats.function: the walk to court; the city in dawn
beats.opening_trigger: She crosses the bridge to the Court.
beats.closing_image: she steps into the central hall.

chapters.title: Tao
chapters.opening_image: Tao's almost-empty office on the morning of the verdict day.
chapters.summary: Lin Wei finds Tao packing. She asks the question she has never asked. Tao gives one short answer. Lin Wei says 'Mother' for the first time on the page.

beats.opening_trigger: Lin Wei knocks on the open door.
beats.closing_image: Tao turns; silver hair down; bare feet in sandals.

beats.opening_trigger: Tao: 'Ask me, child.'
beats.closing_image: 'The trial in 2042. What was it about.'

facts.detail: 'child' — first use
'What was the 2042 trial about.'

state_changes.before: carried the question alone for 29 years
state_changes.after: has asked it aloud

beats.function: Tao answers; Lin Wei says 'Mother' for the first time on the page
beats.opening_trigger: Tao: 'It was about a man named Han.'
beats.closing_image: 'Mother,' Lin Wei says — first use of the word on the page in 29 years.

facts.detail: Lin Yan refused to name Han at her trial; lost her license
first time on the page

state_changes.after: Mother is named

chapters.title: The Choice
chapters.opening_image: the speculum refilled, dimmer than before.
chapters.summary: Climax. The case is going to win. Han Bo refuses a final statement. Lin Wei rises and asks the court to receive her own memory as a witness — procedurally illegal.

beats.opening_trigger: Han Bo present for the first time; civilian dress; hands on his knees.
beats.closing_image: she sets her right hand over the inner left pocket of her robe.

facts.detail: first appearance in court
right hand over envelope-pocket

beats.function: Han Bo's silence; their look across the well
beats.opening_trigger: Their eyes meet across the speculum.
beats.closing_image: Han Bo inclines his head; he does not speak; she inclines hers back.

facts.detail: second time in the novel
first time in the novel
the silence the law lets him keep

state_changes.after: will not prosecute

beats.opening_trigger: She stands; addresses the senior judge.
beats.closing_image: 'I am aware, senior judge.'

facts.detail: procedurally illegal; from the prosecution chair
fitness to hold office now in question

state_changes.after: has submitted her career to the Council

beats.function: Council recesses; Lin Wei is asked to wait
beats.opening_trigger: Han Bo bows to the bench, does not look at her, leaves.
beats.closing_image: she sits in the antechamber by the window; the rain has stopped.

chapters.title: The Garden
chapters.opening_image: the same garden as ch.1, no robe burning, only ashes.
chapters.summary: Lin Wei is asked to retire her own robe by sundown. Sentencing in the Han Bo case is delayed. Mei has resigned. Tao is gone. Lin Wei opens her father's letter. The novel ends with a single remembered line.

beats.opening_trigger: Senior judge delivers the Council decision.
beats.closing_image: she inclines her head: 'I thank the Council.'

facts.detail: retire your robe at sundown
thirty days; new prosecutor to be appointed

state_changes.after: to be retired by sundown

beats.opening_trigger: Lin Wei at the brazier; Park and Sun witness.
beats.closing_image: the linen at the bottom is a black mat; the sun on the College wall.

facts.detail: Park + Sun witness; no Tao (out of office); no Mei (resigned)

state_changes.after: private person

beats.opening_trigger: Back in the apartment, late light.
beats.closing_image: she reads it twice; folds it; sets it square with the corner.

facts.detail: Han asked your mother to do an off-record extraction for a grieving friend; she refused; she would not name him; she lost everything for that silence; I told the prosecution where to look

state_changes.after: has the father's own words

beats.opening_trigger: Lin Wei looks up at the sky over the College wall.
beats.closing_image: she opens the door; she steps out.

facts.detail: 'Wei, little Wei, look up at me, child.'

state_changes.after: the mother has a line, and the line has been allowed

subplots.name: Mei's Defection
subplots.dramatic_question: Will Mei warn Lin Wei in time?
subplots.resolution: Mei resigns the day before Lin Wei's choice; Lin Wei learns it from the staff bulletin.

subplots.name: The Father's Letter
subplots.resolution: She opens it in the final scene.
